---
title: "Glossary of Terms"
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    css: ../../www/styles.css
    toc: true
params:
  last_updated: "2026-03-27"
---

<div class="about-meta">
Last updated: `r params$last_updated`
</div>

---

## Overview

This glossary provides definitions for the common terms and acronyms used throughout the ALIGN Global Hub.

## Terms and Acronyms

| Term / Acronym | Definition |
|----------------|------------|
| **ALIGN** | Advancing Country-Led Innovation Introduction through Government Engagement and EvideNce. |
| **DALY** | Disability-Adjusted Life Year. A measure of overall disease burden, expressed as the number of years lost due to ill-health, disability, or early death. |
| **EML** | Essential Medicines List. A list of medicines that satisfy the priority health care needs of a population, maintained by the WHO and national governments. |
| **GBD** | Global Burden of Disease. A comprehensive regional and global research program of disease burden that assesses mortality and disability from major diseases, injuries, and risk factors. |
| **GRA** | Global Regulatory Approval. Refers to approval or prequalification by a global body such as the WHO, US FDA, or EMA. |
| **IHME** | Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation. |
| **LMIC** | Low- and Middle-Income Country. |
| **MNCH** | Maternal, Newborn, and Child Health. |
| **NRA** | National Regulatory Authority. The government body responsible for regulating health products at the country level. |
| **P2I** | Portfolio-to-Impact. A model used to estimate development costs, timelines, and probabilities of success for health product portfolios. |
| **WHO PQ** | World Health Organization Prequalification. A service that ensures health products meet global standards of quality, safety, and efficacy. |

## Further Reading

For more detailed information on specific fields and data sources, refer to the [Data Dictionary](data_dictionary.html){target="_blank"} and [Integrated Horizon Scanning Sources](horizon_sources.html){target="_blank"}.

***

![](../../../www/logo/with_partners.png){height=120px}

© 2026 ALIGN Consortium. All rights reserved.

{{< fa globe >}} [Website](https://alignconsortium.org){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa brands github >}} [GitHub](https://github.com/ALIGN-Consortium/GlobalHub){target="_blank"}
&nbsp;|&nbsp;
{{< fa envelope >}} [Contact](mailto:align@duke.edu)
